zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Strickland於1268年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾時，她的父親Sir William Strickland45歲，母親Elisabeth d'Eyncourt32歲。她於1292年與Robert de Washington I在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1365年在英國維斯特莫藍德肯達爾享年97歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Strickland于1268年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾时，她的父亲Sir William Strickland45岁，母亲Elisabeth d'Eyncourt32岁。她于1292年与Robert de Washington I在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1365年在英国維斯特莫藍德肯達爾享年97岁。

nameMeanings.name: Strickland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Great and Little Strickland (Westmorland) or Strickland Ketel and Strickland Roger (also Westmorland). The placenames derive from Old English stīrc ‘stirk, young bullock or heifer’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Strickland was born in 1268, in Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England, her father, Sir William Strickland, was 45 and her mother, Elisabeth d'Eyncourt, was 32. She married Robert de Washington I in 1292, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1365, in Kendal, Westmorland, England, at the age of 97.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Strickland est née en 1268, à Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Strickland, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth d'Eyncourt, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Washington I en 1292, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1365, à Kendal, Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 97 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Strickland 1268 in Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Strickland 45 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth d'Eyncourt 32. Sie hat 1292 in Yorkshire, England Robert de Washington I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1365 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Kendal, Westmorland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Strickland è nata il nel 1268 nel Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England, sua padre, Sir William Strickland, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth d'Eyncourt, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Washington I nel 1292, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1365, nel Kendal, Westmorland, England, all'età di 97 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Stricklandが1268年にイギリスウエストモーランドシズエルグ ハルで生まれた時，父Sir William Stricklandは45歳，母Elisabeth d'Eyncourtは32歳であった。1292年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでRobert de Washington Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1365年にイギリスウエストモーランドケンダルで97歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Strickland(이)가 1268년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 시즈르그h 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Strickland(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth d'Eyncourt(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1292년 영국 요르크실르에서 Robert de Washington I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1365년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 켄다에서 97세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Strickland nasceu em 1268, em Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Strickland, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth d'Eyncourt, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Washington I em 1292, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1365, em Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 97 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Strickland родилась в 1268 г. в местности сизирг холл, вестморланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Strickland было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth d'Eyncourt, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Washington I в 1292 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1365 г. в местности кендаль, вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 97 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Strickland nació en 1268, en Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Strickland, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Elisabeth d'Eyncourt, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Robert de Washington I en 1292, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1365, en Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 97 años.
